form.formComment: Last start 6th (Fr4) over 1758m at this track, at the bell was 6th-14.5 beaten 10 m by Wongalea Meg (2:13.10) in NR 34 to 35 on March 10 at $19. Two runs back 9th (Fr1) over 2147m at this track beaten 35 m by Arendelle (2:39.30) in 4yo+ NR up to 50 on January 1 at $101. Draws well so can improve.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin from the mobile.
Broke gait free of interference near the 600m.
Inconvenienced after the start when Girlsgotcurls broke gait.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 7th (Fr5) over 1635m at Temora, beaten 45 m by Our Ultimate Bonny (2:00.90) in NR 34 to 38 on April 6 at $19. Draws for a good showing.

Before that 9th (Sr3) over 1758m at this track beaten 45 m by The Banker (2:09.60) in NR 36 to 40 on March 10 at $151. Unlikely to threaten in this tougher assignment.

Checked rounding the first turn when Like No Other broke gait.

Before that 7th (Fr4) over 1760m after showing early pace at Junee beaten 19 m by Ronzel Sonny (2:12.90) in NR 40 to 40 on March 17 at $71. Cannot enthuse on what we have seen of late.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, surrendered the lead and finished 5th (Fr4) over 1635m after showing early pace at Temora beaten 40 m by Our Ultimate Bonny (2:00.90) in NR 34 to 38 on April 6 at $19. Before that 7th (Sr1) over 1760m at Junee beaten 40 m by All So Sassy (2:12.50) in NR 36 to 39 on March 17 at $51. Others make more appeal.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into sixth after showing early speed, behind Harjaybro at Temora over 1635m in a 0-1 WIN on April 6 at $8. Raced better the start before that with a game effort when 3rd (Sr4) over 1758m at this track was 5th-14 at the bell, beaten 6 m by Wongalea Meg (2:13.10) in NR 34 to 35 on March 10 at $34. Can play a major role.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running rounding the home turn.
Tightened for room entering the first turn when Lord Percy Hung in.
Held up for clear running in the early stages of the home straight.
Inconvenienced as a result of French Street breaking gait.

form.formComment: Not far away at the last couple starts; Finished a narrow second behind Mastablasta at Temora over 1635m NR up to 33 last start. Before that was beaten a head second at Junee over 1760m same class on March 31. Close to a win.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running in the home straight and not fully tested.
Near the 50m, taken in by Pad Thai which hung-in.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a good run when 2nd (Sr3) over 1760m at Junee was 7th-10.8 at the bell, beaten 5.5 m by Jungle Shark (2:13.40) in NR 34 to 38 on March 31 at $61. Likely to be in the mix.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Gave ground from the 600m to finish in 8th position beaten 49.8m.
Slow to begin. Inconvenienced approaching the 300m by Glenlea Hanover.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into second behind My Latin Lady at Junee over 2170m in a NR up to 50 M on March 31 at $21. Then a handy effort when a close second after a quick start, behind Modern Sheen at Temora over 1635m in a NR up to 47 M on April 6 at $26. Among the top chances.
